label: Faça login na sua conta e otimize sua ro…
title: Login Sintropia
innerText:
Faça login na sua conta e otimize sua rotina com Sintropia.

Recuperar Senha
Entrar
Entrar com Google
Instale nosso app
Primeira vez aqui?
Cadastre-se Agora!
Não é psi?
Sou paciente
Legal
•
Privacidade
•
Termos
•
Uso
outerHTML:
Faça login na sua conta e otimize sua rotina com Sintropia.

Primeira vez aqui?
Não é psi?
Legal • Privacidade • Termos • Uso

Recomendado! É mais rápido e seguro, pois você não precisa lembrar de mais uma senha.

Mín. 6 caracteres
Uma maiúscula (A–Z)
Um número (0–9)
Um caractere especial (!@#$%^&*)

Insira seu e-mail para receber o link de cadastro na Sintropia.

computedStyles.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 2px 6px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 14px 30px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 0px 36px 60px -24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 0px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0px 24px 48px 0px inset
computedStyles.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.137) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

cssRules.css: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Poppins-Medium, sans-serif;

min-width: 500px; border-radius: 0px; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: clamp(24px, 4vw, 38px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.53); z-index: 2; backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(130%); isolation: isolate; box-shadow: var(--sdw-line),0 8px 64px #00000033,0 4px 12px #00000012; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, rgba(188, 116, 255, 0.34), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.082)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; overflow: auto; width: 527px !important;

border-radius: 48px; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; align-content: center; justify-items: center; padding: clamp(24px, 4vw, 38px); height: auto; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.53); margin-right: 64px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.137); z-index: 2; backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(130%); isolation: isolate; overflow: visible; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 2px 6px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 14px 30px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 0px 36px 60px -24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) 0px 1px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 0px -1px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0px 24px 48px inset;

background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.243) 0px, rgba(250, 102, 255, 0.03) 3%, rgba(152, 255, 255, 0.06) 40%, rgba(249, 168, 255, 0.28) 60%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.816) 100%); width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 0px; border-radius: 0px; border-left-width: medium; border-left-style: none; border-left-color: currentcolor; border-right-width: medium; border-right-style: none; border-right-color: currentcolor; min-width: 100%; justify-content: start; box-shadow: rgba(70, 46, 118, 0.28) 0px 28px 42px -34px; min-height: var(--st-app-height) !important; display: flex !important; overflow: visible !important;

label: input#username
title: Login Sintropia
outerHTML: <input class="login-25-input" type="text" id="username" name="username" placeholder="E-mail" required="" autofocus="" autocomplete="username" inputmode="email" enterkeyhint="next" autocapitalize="none" spellcheck="false">

computedStyles.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.784) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

cssRules.css: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Poppins-Medium, sans-serif;

inline-size: 100%; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 30px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.784); cursor: text; transition: box-shadow 1s, background 0.2s, transform 50ms, border-color 0.2s; height: 52px; font-size: 12px; color: inherit; box-shadow: var(--sdw-m) !important;

label: input#password
title: Login Sintropia
outerHTML: <input class="login-25-input" type="password" id="password" name="password" placeholder="Senha" required="" autocomplete="current-password" enterkeyhint="done">

computedStyles.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

cssRules.css: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Poppins-Medium, sans-serif;

position: absolute; right: 30%; bottom: -50%; inline-size: 160vmin; block-size: 160vmin; border-radius: 50%; mask-image: radial-gradient(closest-side, rgb(0, 0, 0) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9) 55%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 75%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7) 100%); backdrop-filter: blur(2px) saturate(300%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.408); box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.333) 0px 0px 12px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45) 0px 0px 16px -10px;

outerHTML:
Faça login na sua conta e otimize sua rotina com Sintropia.

Primeira vez aqui?
Não é psi?
Legal • Privacidade • Termos • Uso

Recomendado! É mais rápido e seguro, pois você não precisa lembrar de mais uma senha.

Mín. 6 caracteres
Uma maiúscula (A–Z)
Um número (0–9)
Um caractere especial (!@#$%^&*)

Insira seu e-mail para receber o link de cadastro na Sintropia.

computedStyles.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 2px 6px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 14px 30px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 0px 36px 60px -24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 0px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0px 24px 48px 0px inset
computedStyles.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.137) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

cssRules.css: margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Poppins-Medium, sans-serif;

min-width: 500px; border-radius: 0px; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: clamp(24px, 4vw, 38px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.53); z-index: 2; backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(130%); isolation: isolate; box-shadow: var(--sdw-line),0 8px 64px #00000033,0 4px 12px #00000012; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, rgba(188, 116, 255, 0.34), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.082)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; overflow: auto; width: 527px !important;

border-radius: 48px; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; align-content: center; justify-items: center; padding: clamp(24px, 4vw, 38px); height: auto; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.44); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.53); margin-right: 64px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.137); z-index: 2; backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(130%); isolation: isolate; overflow: visible; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 2px 6px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 14px 30px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 0px 36px 60px -24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) 0px 1px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 0px -1px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0px 24px 48px inset;

background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.243) 0px, rgba(250, 102, 255, 0.03) 3%, rgba(152, 255, 255, 0.06) 40%, rgba(249, 168, 255, 0.28) 60%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.816) 100%); width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 0px; border-radius: 0px; border-left-width: medium; border-left-style: none; border-left-color: currentcolor; border-right-width: medium; border-right-style: none; border-right-color: currentcolor; min-width: 100%; justify-content: start; box-shadow: rgba(70, 46, 118, 0.28) 0px 28px 42px -34px; min-height: var(--st-app-height) !important; display: flex !important; overflow: visible !important;
